title: ICV
short description: ICV is a NATO-operated VLF transmitted located in the island of Tavolara, Sardinia, Italy.
description:
ICV is a NATO-operated VLF transmitted located in the island of Tavolara, near Golfo Aranci, Sardinia, Italy. 
It transmits on 20.27 kHz and 20.76 kHz with MSK modulation.

It uses a vally-span antenna strung across a small bay (Baia degli Angeli).
